category_sources: Official Exiv2 homepage describes a C++ metadata library and command-line utility for Exif, IPTC, XMP, and ICC profile metadata.
source_facts.description: EXIF and IPTC metadata manipulation library and tools.
docs_sources: Official Exiv2 site provides API documentation and project documentation links.
Official Exiv2 utility manual documents the command-line tool.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Exiv2/exiv2, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Exiv2 homepage adds XMP, ICC profile, C++ library, and command-line utility context.
source_facts.description identifies EXIF and IPTC metadata manipulation library and tools.
